item.title: A Life-Saving Military Rescue Story
item.description: A powerful account of a military life-saving effort in action. Focus on emergency response, bravery under pressure, and the impact of quick decisions in critical situations.

media:content.media:title: A Life-Saving Military Rescue Story
media:content.media:description: A powerful account of a military life-saving effort in action. Focus on emergency response, bravery under pressure, and the impact of quick decisions in critical situations.

item.title: Recon Scout Frontline Story
item.description: A firsthand account from a reconnaissance scout on the front lines. Focus on observation, patrol missions, and the challenges of gathering intelligence in combat zones.

media:content.media:title: Recon Scout Frontline Story
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account from a reconnaissance scout on the front lines. Focus on observation, patrol missions, and the challenges of gathering intelligence in combat zones.

item.title: Kelly Elmlinger Military Service Story
item.description: A personal account of Kelly Elmlinger’s military service journey. Focus on training, deployment experiences, and the dedication and challenges of serving in uniform.

media:content.media:title: Kelly Elmlinger Military Service Story
media:content.media:description: A personal account of Kelly Elmlinger’s military service journey. Focus on training, deployment experiences, and the dedication and challenges of serving in uniform.

item.title: From Veteran to Olympic Athlete
item.description: A story of transition from military service to Olympic competition. Focus on discipline, resilience, and the journey of becoming an elite athlete after serving as a veteran.

media:content.media:title: From Veteran to Olympic Athlete
media:content.media:description: A story of transition from military service to Olympic competition. Focus on discipline, resilience, and the journey of becoming an elite athlete after serving as a veteran.

item.title: How Accurate Was Good Morning, Vietnam?
item.description: A breakdown of the film Good Morning, Vietnam and its historical accuracy. Focus on real events, military broadcasting, and how Hollywood adapted the story.

media:content.media:title: How Accurate Was Good Morning, Vietnam?
media:content.media:description: A breakdown of the film Good Morning, Vietnam and its historical accuracy. Focus on real events, military broadcasting, and how Hollywood adapted the story.

item.title: Medevac Missions and Critical Decisions
item.description: A look at the tough decisions and sacrifices involved in prioritizing medevac operations. Focus on emergency response, timing, and life-saving air medical transport.

media:content.media:title: Medevac Missions and Critical Decisions
media:content.media:description: A look at the tough decisions and sacrifices involved in prioritizing medevac operations. Focus on emergency response, timing, and life-saving air medical transport.

item.title: Veteran Shares a Medal Award Moment
item.description: A veteran reflects on a meaningful moment receiving a medal. Focus on service, recognition, and the personal significance of military honors.

media:content.media:title: Veteran Shares a Medal Award Moment
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on a meaningful moment receiving a medal. Focus on service, recognition, and the personal significance of military honors.

item.title: WWII Story of Loss and Remembrance
item.description: A World War II story reflecting on loss, sacrifice, and remembrance. Focus on historical experience, personal memory, and honoring those affected by war.

media:content.media:title: WWII Story of Loss and Remembrance
media:content.media:description: A World War II story reflecting on loss, sacrifice, and remembrance. Focus on historical experience, personal memory, and honoring those affected by war.

item.title: Marine Corps Journey and Service Story
item.description: A personal account of Marine Corps service and military journey. Focus on training, deployment experiences, and the challenges and dedication of military life.

media:content.media:title: Marine Corps Journey and Service Story
media:content.media:description: A personal account of Marine Corps service and military journey. Focus on training, deployment experiences, and the challenges and dedication of military life.

item.title: Marines at Peleliu: Battle Story
item.description: A historical account of Marines during the Battle of Peleliu. Focus on combat conditions, sacrifice, and the challenges faced during one of WWII’s intense Pacific battles.

media:content.media:title: Marines at Peleliu: Battle Story
media:content.media:description: A historical account of Marines during the Battle of Peleliu. Focus on combat conditions, sacrifice, and the challenges faced during one of WWII’s intense Pacific battles.
